name: Baked Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the baked potatoes and reserve the pulp.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, sauté the chopped onion in butter over medium-low heat until soft.
3. Add chicken stock, salt, pepper, and reserved potato pulp to the pan. Stir to combine.
4. Stir in half-and-half and heat to serving temperature.
5. Serve the soup in bowls and garnish with sour cream, minced green onions or parsley.
